text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... The weariness just won't go away. So many races in such a short span of time does take its toll.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But of course, I do realize my destination lies at
the end of this path.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...No, pay that no mind. Please forget I said
anything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Mejiro Bright's race fatigue is
catching up with her. Maybe I'd better rearrange
her race schedule.
